sources.text: Northwind Analytics raised its Pro plan from $49 to $79 per seat this quarter, and removed the free tier.
Northwind Analytics is hiring 12 enterprise account executives and 4 solutions engineers across North America.
Northwind Analytics closed a $40M Series B led by Acme Ventures to expand into the EU market.
Customers praise Northwind's dashboards but report slow support response times since the recent pricing change.
Reach our press office at jane.doe@northwind.example or call +1 (415) 555-0137. CONFIDENTIAL — internal board deck, do not distribute: projected churn 14%.
